name: PocMap
description: MCP Server for CVE lookup, exploit discovery, and vulnerability reporting. Enables AI agents to search for CVE details, find PoCs from GitHub/Metasploit/ExploitDB/Nuclei, discover bug bounty reports, find CTF labs, and generate vulnerability reports.
author: PocMap Team

stdio.description: STDIO transport for Claude Desktop and local MCP clients

sse.description: SSE transport for remote access and browser-based clients

cve://{cve_id}.name: cve_info
cve://{cve_id}.description: Full CVE information including description, CVSS scores, EPSS, KEV status, CWEs, references, and affected vendor/product

exploits://{cve_id}.name: cve_exploits
exploits://{cve_id}.description: Complete list of available exploits and PoCs for a CVE from all sources (GitHub, Metasploit, ExploitDB, Nuclei)

report://{cve_id}.name: cve_report
report://{cve_id}.description: Generated vulnerability report for a CVE including CVE info, exploits, labs, and bug bounty reports

lookup_cve.description: Look up detailed CVE information from NVD and enrichment sources

get_epss_score.description: Get the EPSS probability score for a CVE
get_epss_score.output_schema: string - EPSS score with risk level

check_kev_status.description: Check if a CVE is in the CISA KEV catalog

find_github_pocs.description: Find GitHub PoC repositories for a CVE
find_github_pocs.output_schema: string - Formatted list of GitHub PoCs

find_metasploit_module.description: Find a Metasploit module for a CVE
find_metasploit_module.output_schema: string - Metasploit module info or not-found message

find_exploitdb_entry.description: Find an ExploitDB entry for a CVE
find_exploitdb_entry.output_schema: string - ExploitDB entry info or not-found message

find_nuclei_template.description: Find a Nuclei vulnerability scanner template for a CVE
find_nuclei_template.output_schema: string - Nuclei template info or not-found message

find_bug_bounty_reports.description: Find bug bounty reports and write-ups for a CVE
find_bug_bounty_reports.output_schema: string - Formatted list of bug bounty reports

find_practice_labs.description: Find CTF labs and practice environments for a CVE
find_practice_labs.output_schema: string - Formatted list of lab environments

find_vulhub_docker.description: Find a Vulhub Docker environment for a CVE
find_vulhub_docker.output_schema: string - Vulhub Docker URL and setup instructions

cve_to_cpe.description: Convert a CVE to its associated CPEs
cve_to_cpe.output_schema: string - Formatted list of CPE information

cpe_to_cve.description: Convert a CPE to its associated CVEs

input_schema.cpe: string - CPE 2.3 URI or simplified product identifier

cpe_to_cve.output_schema: string - Formatted list of CVE identifiers

generate_json_report.description: Generate a comprehensive JSON vulnerability report for one or more CVEs

input_schema.cve_ids: string - Comma-separated list of CVE identifiers

generate_html_report.description: Generate a comprehensive HTML vulnerability report for one or more CVEs

input_schema.cve_ids: string - Comma-separated list of CVE identifiers

discover_product_cves.description: Discover CVEs affecting a product by name and version (supports aliases)

input_schema.product: string - Product name (e.g. 'Apache Struts'); aliases supported
input_schema.vendor: string - Optional vendor name for disambiguation

find_recent_exploits.description: Discover recently published CVEs with exploit intelligence and filters

input_schema.only_with_poc: boolean - Only CVEs with known PoCs
input_schema.min_epss: number - Minimum EPSS score on a 0-100 scale
input_schema.sort: string - Sort by cve_date, severity, or epss

find_recent_exploits.output_schema: string - JSON list of recent CVEs with metadata

get_cve_assessment_playbook.description: Retrieve the structured CVE assessment playbook
get_cve_assessment_playbook.output_schema: string - JSON playbook with phases and steps

get_rapid_response_playbook.description: Retrieve the rapid-response playbook for critical/zero-day CVEs
get_rapid_response_playbook.output_schema: string - JSON playbook with phases and steps

get_bug_bounty_playbook.description: Retrieve the bug bounty submission playbook
get_bug_bounty_playbook.output_schema: string - JSON playbook with phases and steps

vulnerability_assessment.description: Structured vulnerability assessment workflow for analyzing CVEs
vulnerability_assessment.use_case: Comprehensive CVE analysis with risk scoring and remediation recommendations

exploit_research.description: Deep exploit research prompt for analyzing exploit code and building detection rules
exploit_research.use_case: Technical exploit analysis with detection engineering focus

bug_bounty_analysis.description: Analyze bug bounty reports to extract exploitation techniques and security lessons
bug_bounty_analysis.use_case: Real-world impact analysis from bug bounty write-ups
